name: Chongqing Gangjiu Co.,Ltd
summary: Chongqing Gangjiu Co.,Ltd provides cargo handling services primarily in China. The company offers logistics consulting, logistics planning, ship generation, freight forwarding, port loading and unloading, land and water transfer, inland river passenger and cargo transportation, container transit transportation, warehousing, distribution and other integrated logistics, and shipment services. It also provides passenger and cargo transport, inland freight, goods handling, materials, goods storage, container, and other services. In addition, the company offers commodity storage, ship repair, and charge d'affaires transport and transit services, In addition, the company engages in the sales of automobiles, electrical machinery and equipment, chemical raw materials and products, building materials, rubber products, wood and products, and arts and crafts; operations of department stores; import and export of goods; and manufacture of general machinery and ship parts. Chongqing Gangjiu Co.,Ltd is based in Chongqing, China.
